misconception: Differentiates f(g(x)) as f'(x) times g'(x), applying product rule reasoning to composite functions.
preference: Has an example-first preference: show an example first before abstract rules.
goal: Has a midterm goal to prepare for a differentiation midterm covering chain rule.
affect: Feels anxious about the chain rule midterm.
mastery: Session2 mastery quote: outer derivative/inner derivative means take the outer derivative, leave the inside alone, times inner derivative.
